current_commit_message: Update parser to handle subqueries, separate out tests better, and improve parser testing.
Add new models and corresponding data to db for better testing ability.
Update test resources and schemas with Node and CompositeNode.
First semi working version of subresource filtering. Add substantial tests for query_builder.
Some more query_builder and integration tests with small fixes.
Small resource fixes, bunch of tests added.
Add more resource tests and fixes. Clean up test warnings.
More resource tests. General clean up/linting elsewhere.
Update single relations to handle put/post more gracefully. Testing and related fixes added elsewhere.
More small tweaks via testing.
Better offset and limit handling. More test coverage.
Better error handling, impoved documentation, more tests added.
Refactor schema to separate out ResourceSchema from ModelResourceSchema.
Break out model dependent portions of resources and schemas.
Remove new abstract code that was breaking py2 support.
Forgot a decorator while removing abstract base class code.
Modify convert_key_name and whitelist methods to make use of subresources when possible.
More resource testing.
Refactor to go from nested schema to nested resource.
More resource and parser tests. Other small fixes and refactoring.
More testing. Remove error translation for now due to lack of Marshmallow support.
Rename test_fields.py to test_schema.py.
Update dependencies, drop Py2 support.
Change fail to make_error to match new marshmallow conventions.
Handle nested required filtering, update error handling and messages.
Modernize packaging.
Fixes for SQLAlchemy 2.0.0 -> 2.0.42 update.
Clean up mssql test setup.
Ensure mappers are configured and fix count bug.
Clean up example api.
Version bump to 1.0.0
